creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 236584
Screenshot: something between the words SHARING and A

The result of copying a link to the anchored point: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=ccache&sektion=1&manpath=FreeBSD-Ports#SHARINGA_CACHE>

There's a troublesome character between the words SHARING and A. 

From the screenshot, I might guess that it's a tab character. 

(I don't have the number handy, but there was a similar bug a few months ago for a different page.)
